decisions.question: Format reference structure and per-section content rules for STRATEGY's unique sections
Skill phase structure (0-5) and Phase 4 jury prompt text for the three reviewer agents
Lifecycle file management: Sunset directory mapping and transition-status.sh behavior contract
R7 custom check implementation shape: function name, error code, dispatch point

cross_validation_notes: Conflict resolved in-design: D3 introduced checkStrategySunsetReason validate check; D4 only commits to checkStrategyPublic. Resolution: drop the second Go check; Sunset reason recording is enforced by transition-status.sh require-arg + Phase 4 structural reviewer check (D2). Avoids adding a second error code for content better verified at the skill jury layer.

PRD extension surfaced: D3 added Accepted -> Sunset transition. PRD R4 table only shows Active -> Sunset. Design extends PRD R4 with explicit rationale (bet can be invalidated before downstream consumption). Recorded as a design-level refinement; PRD amendment not required because R4 was non-exhaustive.
Capitalization: PRD R8 specifies Name: "Strategy"; D4 used Name: "STRATEGY". Design uses "Strategy" per PRD authoritative spec.
D2 mentions org-scope STRATEGY without upstream VISION; D1's flexible Strategic Context sub-structure supports this. Recorded as a load-bearing assumption.
D3 adds Accepted -> Sunset; D5 evals don't cover this transition. Added as eval scenario #8.
